LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT AND JUDGMENT AND ALLOWING FILING OF ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. A R G U E D AND THE COURT ADOPTED TENTATIVE RULING -- DEFENDANT NICHEMUSIC.COM, INC.'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT AND JUDGMENT AND ALLOWING FILING OF ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS GRANTED, RELIEF FROM DEFAULT IS GRANTED AND DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED TO FILE ANSWER. COSTS OF $250 IS ALSO AWARDED. THE COURT ORDERED A STAY FOR RELEASING THE SETTLEMENT OF $3,000 UNTIL A MOTION FOR ATTACHMENT IS MADE. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A STAY OF ACTION PENDING FOR APPEAL WAS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

Motion For Order Setting Aside Default And Judgment And Allowing Filing Of Answer To Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-17-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Dan M. Himmelheber, Esq., 650/345-9822, for defendant NICHEMUSIC.COM, INC. moving to set aside default and judgment
Jerry K. Cimmet, Esq., 650/866-4700, for plaintiff GIRLIE ACTION MEDIA, INC., opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court adopted tentative ruling -- Defendant NICHEMUSIC.COM, INC.'s motion for an order setting aside default and judgment and allowing filing of answer to complaint is GRANTED, Relief from default is GRANTED and defendant is allowed to file answer. Costs of $250 is also awarded. The Court ordered a stay for releasing the settlement of $3,000 until a motion for attachment is made. Plaintiff's request for a stay of action pending for appeal was denied. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.(AJR/301/MD) Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II (301) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855
